tools.name: list_cities
tools.description: List the cities gigstamp currently covers, with their listing URLs. Call this first: only these cities return data.

tools.name: list_venues
tools.description: List the venues gigstamp tracks in a supported city, from small independent rooms to the city's larger touring venues. Each carries a scale (grassroots|major).

tools.name: search_gigs_and_events
tools.description: Search a supported city's upcoming live music and events: band gigs, open mics, comedy nights, jam and folk sessions, festivals, and club nights, spanning grassroots gigs at small independent venues through to major shows at the city's big rooms (the local grassroots scene is front and centre, but c

tools.name: get_gig
tools.description: Get one gig by its slug within a supported city.
